# Test: apx breaking for Avro schemas
# Verifies breaking change detection with Avro format (native Go, no external tools)

# Test breaking detection — new required field without default (should fail)
! exec apx breaking --against=v1.avsc v2_breaking.avsc
stderr 'without a default'

# Test with explicit format flag
! exec apx breaking --format=avro --against=v1.avsc v2_breaking.avsc
stderr 'without a default'

# Test safe change — new field with nullable union default (should pass)
exec apx breaking --against=v1.avsc v2_safe.avsc

# Test field removal — safe in BACKWARD mode (reader ignores unknown writer fields)
exec apx breaking --against=v1.avsc v2_removed.avsc

# Test type change — breaking
! exec apx breaking --against=v1.avsc v2_type_change.avsc
stderr 'type changed'

# Test missing --against flag (should fail with helpful error)
! exec apx breaking v1.avsc
stderr '--against is required'

-- v1.avsc --
{
  "type": "record",
  "name": "User",
  "namespace": "com.example",
  "fields": [
    {"name": "id", "type": "string"},
    {"name": "name", "type": "string"}
  ]
}
-- v2_breaking.avsc --
{
  "type": "record",
  "name": "User",
  "namespace": "com.example",
  "fields": [
    {"name": "id", "type": "string"},
    {"name": "name", "type": "string"},
    {"name": "phone", "type": "string"}
  ]
}
-- v2_safe.avsc --
{
  "type": "record",
  "name": "User",
  "namespace": "com.example",
  "fields": [
    {"name": "id", "type": "string"},
    {"name": "name", "type": "string"},
    {"name": "email", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}
  ]
}
-- v2_removed.avsc --
{
  "type": "record",
  "name": "User",
  "namespace": "com.example",
  "fields": [
    {"name": "id", "type": "string"}
  ]
}
-- v2_type_change.avsc --
{
  "type": "record",
  "name": "User",
  "namespace": "com.example",
  "fields": [
    {"name": "id", "type": "long"},
    {"name": "name", "type": "string"}
  ]
}
